risks: This is local/internal admin audit safe-summary visibility only.
Durable production admin console readiness, real DB persistence validation, production audit retention, rate limits, export file generation, and multi-admin audit policy remain future scoped work.
mitigations: Admin auth is checked before audit export.
Audit action and target_type allowlists are enforced.
Unsafe metadata is redacted or unknown unsafe entries are excluded.
Full test and evidence gates are checked before review recommendation.
